Legal.termsIntro: Welcome to Marketna. By using our website and services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions.
Legal.privacyIntro: At Marketna, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information.
Legal.useOfServiceContent: Our services are provided for your personal and non-commercial use. You agree not to misuse the services or help anyone else do so.
Legal.dataCollectionContent: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, make a purchase, or contact us for support.
Legal.infoUsageContent: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process transactions, and communicate important updates regarding your account or our marketplace.
Legal.cookiesContent: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and preferences. By using Marketna, you consent to our use of these technologies for a better shopping experience.
Legal.communityContent: We expect all users to respect the platform and other participants. Any form of harassment or unauthorized data extraction is strictly prohibited.
Legal.agreementPre: Agreement to these terms is prerequisite for using Marketna services.
